synapse: Semantic search engine for your contacts. Turn flat contact lists into a queryable knowledge base - ask natural language questions like "who do I know that's built fintech products?" and get relevant connections ranked by relationship strength.
wispr-flow: Local-first voice-to-text for macOS. Sub-300ms latency using Whisper + MLX on Apple Silicon, with optional on-device LLM rewriting. Fully offline, zero cloud dependency, privacy-first.
orqys: Multi-agent engineering ops that converts tickets into production-ready PRs. Orchestrates Context, Planning, Code, and Review agents via MCP to produce deployable code - not suggestions, actual PRs.
bloom: Multi-tenant apprenticeship platform for African markets. Built on Supabase with RLS, real-time messaging, and Paystack split payments. Scaled to 1,200+ users across 50+ programs.
neploy: One-click deployment platform. Push code, get a running app - no Dockerfiles, CI/CD config, or infrastructure provisioning. Auto-detects framework, containerizes, and deploys to AWS.
